mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_check (check_id, check_year, check_month, check_seq, material_id, material_name, book_qty, actual_qty, diff_qty, diff_reason, check_date, checker, approval_status, remark) VALUES (#{checkId}, #{checkYear}, #{checkMonth}, #{checkSeq}, #{materialId}, #{materialName}, #{bookQty}, #{actualQty}, #{diffQty}, #{diffReason}, #{checkDate}, #{checker}, '0', #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_check SET approval_status = '1', approver = #{approver} WHERE check_id = #{checkId}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(check_seq) FROM inventory_check WHERE check_year = #{year} AND check_month = #{month}
